sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16508" key="a)stero/plhktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀστερό-πληκτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n16508.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">struck</tr_> '<tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sine fulmine</tr_>' (by a meteoric bolt), Seneca <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">QN</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.15</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
